content:
I don't have access to the current page content or the ability to browse the web in real time. However, I can guide you on how to find information about "javascript closures" on StackOverflow:

1. Open your browser and go to https://stackoverflow.com/.
2. In the search bar at the top of the page, type "javascript closures" and press Enter.
3. Browse through the search results to find relevant threads or questions about JavaScript closures.
4. Click on the links to read the answers and explanations provided by the community.

If you need more specific information or have a particular question about JavaScript closures, feel free to ask!
